name: Oysters Mock-a-Feller
recipeIngredient: 18 Gefilte fish pieces in a jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all greens fine and mix with margarine and half of the bread crumbs.
2. Reserve remaining bread crumbs.
3. Add remaining ingredients, except fish pieces, to the mixture and blend thoroughly.
4. Drain gefilte fish, slice in half, and place in oven-proof shell-shaped ramekins.
5. Set shells in a pan of hot, coarse kosher rock salt.
6. Spread sauce over fish pieces and sprinkle with remaining bread crumbs.
7. Bake at 450°F for about 25 minutes; then place under the broiler to brown.
